summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Vocabulous spaced learning app redesign. All 14 requested features tested successfully with 100% backend API functionality and full frontend integration working.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with Ethereal Explorer design system
Navigation links scroll to correct sections (Science, Teachers, Students, Pricing)
Login page renders with demo credential hints visible
Student dashboard loads with analytics data (streak, retention, mastered, due cards)
Student study page loads with flashcards and card flipping/grading functionality
Student progress page shows deck progress data
Student achievements page shows earned and locked achievements
Teacher dashboard loads with class analytics data
Teacher classes page shows existing classes
Logout works and redirects to landing page
Signup page renders with role selection (student/teacher)
All 12 backend API endpoints working (100% pass rate)
Authentication flows working for both roles
Flashcard study session with FSRS algorithm working
Design system implementation (lavender/peach/mint palette, glassmorphism, organic fluidity)
